zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Peake於1532年出生在英國倫敦聖 安 安德 聖 阿格尼斯 煙雨 聖 約翰 扎卡里時，她的父親Thomas Anton Peake II28歲，母親Lady Katherine Chamberlain28歲。她於1561年10月5日與Miles Hayward在英國英格蘭波藍德斯米費爾德結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世於1627年享年95歲，埋葬在英國米德萊可倫敦。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Peake于1532年出生在英国倫敦聖 安 安德 聖 阿格尼斯 煙雨 聖 約翰 扎卡里时，她的父亲Thomas Anton Peake II28岁，母亲Lady Katherine Chamberlain28岁。她于1561年10月5日与Miles Hayward在英国英格兰波藍德斯米費爾德结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。她去世于1627年享年95岁，埋葬在英国米德萊可倫敦。

nameMeanings.name: Peake
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Peak  .

variants.name: Peak
meanings: English: habitational name from any of several places in different parts of England named in Old English with pēac ‘hill, knoll, peak’, includingPeak (Hill) in Sidmouth (Devon), East and West Peek in Luffincot (Devon), a minor locality in Chiddingly (Sussex) once called Peke (now Peke's House), and the Peak District, an area of rugged hills in northwest Derbyshire and adjacent counties.
English: possibly a nickname from the Middle English word in 1 above, denoting a stout, thick-set man.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Peake was born in 1532, in Saint Ann and Saint Agnes with Saint John Zachary, London, England, her father, Thomas Anton Peake II, was 28 and her mother, Lady Katherine Chamberlain, was 28. She married Miles Hayward on 5 October 1561, in Smithfield, Cumberland, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died in 1627, at the age of 95, and was buried in London, Middlesex, England.

fr.Saint Ann and Saint Agnes with Saint Joh: Saint Ann and Saint Agnes with Saint John Zachary, Londres, Angleterre
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Peake est née en 1532, à Saint Ann and Saint Agnes with Saint John Zachary, Londres, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Anton Peake II, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Lady Katherine Chamberlain, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé Miles Hayward le 5 octobre 1561, à Smithfield, Cumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée en 1627, à l’âge de 95 ans, et a été enterrée à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Peake 1532 in Saint Ann and Saint Agnes with Saint John Zachary, London, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Anton Peake II 28 und ihre Mutter Lady Katherine Chamberlain 28. Sie hat am 5. Oktober 1561 in Smithfield, Cumberland, England, United Kingdom Miles Hayward geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb 1627 im Alter von 95 Jahren und wurde in London, Middlesex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Peake è nata il nel 1532 nel Saint Ann and Saint Agnes with Saint John Zachary, London, England, sua padre, Thomas Anton Peake II, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Lady Katherine Chamberlain, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato Miles Hayward il 5 ottobre 1561, nel Smithfield, Cumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì nel 1627, all'età di 95 anni, e fu sepolta a London, Middlesex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Peakeが1532年にイギリスロンドンサイント アン アンド サイント アグネス ウィス サイント ジョン ザチャーイで生まれた時，父Thomas Anton Peake IIは28歳，母Lady Katherine Chamberlainは28歳であった。1561年10月5日にイギリスイギリスクウンバーランドスミスフィールドでMiles Haywardと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼女は1627年に95歳で死去し，イギリスミッドレセックスロンドンにて埋葬された。

ko.Saint Dunstan and All Saints Church, Ste: 영국 미들레세스 스테p니 세인트 던스탠 앤드 앨 세인츠 c후르치
ko.Saint Ann and Saint Agnes with Saint Joh: 영국 런던 세인트 아 앤드 세인트 애그니스 위스 세인트 존 재커리
ko.lifeSummary: Alice Peake(이)가 1532년 영국 런던 세인트 아 앤드 세인트 애그니스 위스 세인트 존 재커리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Anton Peake II(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Katherine Chamberlain(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1561년 10월 5일 영국 잉글랜드 c벌랜드 스미스필드에서 Miles Hayward(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1627년 95세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 미들레세스 런던에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Peake nasceu em 1532, em Saint Ann and Saint Agnes with Saint John Zachary, London, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Anton Peake II, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Lady Katherine Chamberlain, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com Miles Hayward em 5 de outubro de 1561, em Smithfield, Cumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1627, com 95 anos, e foi sepultada em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra.

ru.Saint Dunstan and All Saints Church, Ste: сеинт дунстань анд алл сеинц чурч, степни, миддлесекс, Англия
ru.Saint Ann and Saint Agnes with Saint Joh: сеинт анн анд сеинт агнесь вит сеинт джон зачэри, Лондон, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Peake родилась в 1532 г. в местности сеинт анн анд сеинт агнесь вит сеинт джон зачэри, Лондон, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas Anton Peake II было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Katherine Chamberlain, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Miles Hayward 5 октября 1561 г. в местности смитфиелд, кумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла в 1627 г. в возрасте 95 лет и была похоронена в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice Peake nació en 1532, en Saint Ann and Saint Agnes with Saint John Zachary, London, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Anton Peake II, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Lady Katherine Chamberlain, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Miles Hayward el 5 de octubre de 1561, en Smithfield, Cumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió en 1627, a la edad de 95 años, y fue sepultada en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra.
